note: SINGLE machine-readable source of project status. Hand-edit THIS file; regenerate the Markdown with `python -m puckworks.statusdoc --write`. CI (`python -m puckworks.statusdoc --verify`) fails on stale/contradictory state. Active queue is capped at 5; completed history and superseded plans live in their own sections. Format is JSON (stdlib, no extra dependency) — the plan's `.yaml` was illustrative.

items.title: Publish and verify the Puckworks v0.2.0 GitHub Release
items.acceptance_evidence: Public GitHub-only release https://github.com/trbrewer/puckworks/releases/tag/v0.2.0 (not on PyPI); record docs/reproducibility/RELEASE_VERIFICATION_v0.2.0.md; source 458ee70bb2eedd79231385fa2d2dad2e1d457aaf; tag-run https://github.com/trbrewer/puckworks/actions/runs/29545862493; canonical wheel sha256 0a54f8782e4173132308af24ce0c88bb48a2d334071382c07c0ff5ecc9082df1, sdist sha256 8b60626328897077ffd1f8de886a086610d808e5fa3a2c829e71a817bf59aaad; public-download SHA256SUMS all OK + py3.12 installed-wheel smoke = 25 components, 50 PASS + 1 ACKNOWLEDGED_EXCEPTION (brewer2026.lb_taichi), serialize round-trip + clean uninstall

items.title: Publish and verify the Puckworks v0.3.0 GitHub Release (Guided Espresso Pull)
items.acceptance_evidence: Public GitHub-only release https://github.com/trbrewer/puckworks/releases/tag/v0.3.0 (not on PyPI); source commit c5ab770b76ea2fb876c348ca48d802d604c112ca; PR #51 merge commit b0144a66070b74313980d3146c4014d484910e50; annotated tag object 0f2d105d1837a215103c69762f6a03aaf935b50a peeling to c5ab770; canonical wheel sha256 4a88931fc0bbc069365242fc5e3ef4d226da9225c80384b6d013028e4b7a3ec0, sdist sha256 dc89d1f40c2e8329ac34b7a474f7b03cb7f17c5c8952f9232a2a2daa3954b1ca; record docs/reproducibility/RELEASE_VERIFICATION_v0.3.0.md; activation commit 9c3fa54c6abe8a07a0ae6075e02f19fb4f5d09a8; verified via authenticated + direct-HTTPS download, clean-room wheel/sdist install, and both live Colab notebooks. An earlier b9e7ddf local candidate was rejected before publication (untracked raw CSVs) and never published.

items.title: Deliver a versioned ShotExplanationBundle for one redistributable bundled shot
items.external_blocker: one formally qualified redistributable individual-shot fixture (recorded license/rights approval) does not yet exist; engineering must NOT invent or substitute a synthetic 'real' fixture
items.resume_trigger: a formally redistributable single-shot fixture is available with recorded license/rights, a stable pinned identity, and a committed checksum + provenance record
items.next_gate: Approve the public `puckworks.product` v1 contract and one formally redistributable single-shot fixture, then verify deterministic contract serialization and fixture loading from an installed wheel.
items.acceptance_evidence: Every available series has a measured/derived/fitted/predicted/simulated origin; availability is represented separately; compatibility and evidence strength are separate; one formally redistributable individual shot is used; the public boundary is puckworks.product; no more than three fixture-supported explanations are ultimately emitted; fewer than three is valid; no unsupported diagnosis, evidence upgrade, flavor prediction, or recipe optimization occurs.

items.title: Guided Espresso Pull — v0.3.0 published; awaiting signed-out human Colab acceptance
items.next_gate: One signed-out human Guided Espresso Pull Colab run against the v0.3.0 wheel (sha256 4a88931fc0bbc069365242fc5e3ef4d226da9225c80384b6d013028e4b7a3ec0): hash verified before install, site-packages import of 0.3.0, domain report, full stage sequence, unsupported wetting/first-drip, prescribed pressure, recorded-only temperature, figures + exports, GUIDED_PULL_COMPLETE, warning retained un-clamped.
items.acceptance_evidence: v0.3.0 PUBLISHED and ACTIVATED: release https://github.com/trbrewer/puckworks/releases/tag/v0.3.0 (source c5ab770); activation PR #52 merged to main 9c3fa54; deterministic reference output, authoritative traces agree with final observables, unsupported states labelled not fabricated, installed-wheel report + hermetic and live guided notebook pass, no private data packaged. Only the human signed-out acceptance remains before closing #48.

items.title: PV-19B: Guided Pull Laboratory — compatible-model lenses + full registry exposure
items.next_gate: Add genuinely executed native reference runners for low-risk components, and a second common-scenario adapter only if a bounded conversion can be demonstrated without inventing a grinder/unit/reference-volume mapping.
items.acceptance_evidence: Core + contract hardening landed (development 0.4.0.dev0). puckworks/product/lab.py: exact scenario identity + override provenance (typed ScenarioRequest/ScenarioExecution; guided_v1 runs no longer mislabelled pv19_named); comparison schema v3; separated scientific-payload vs full-artifact integrity hashes (downloadable artifact carries source_commit/package_version/workflow_run_id/wheel_sha256, supplied explicitly - no git subprocess in the producer); correct observable roles (prescribed/derived/simulated/unsupported/diagnostic); explicit 25-component capability/rights matrix (grudeva2025.reduced RIGHTS_BLOCKED pending #73); honest reference-suite coverage (executed vs runner-not-implemented); real scientific trace plots in Streamlit + Actions batch (required figure) + hash manifest. ONE executed common-scenario lens (cameron2020.extraction_bdf via simulate_pull; no equation duplication). Streamlit app verified booting locally (/_stcore/health 200). Not a validated digital twin; no evidence upgrade. Genuine native reference runners and a demonstrated second adapter remain (see #70).

items.title: PV-03 'The Cup Hides the Clock' — flat-valley practical-identifiability interactive
items.acceptance_evidence: Live at https://trbrewer.github.io/puckworks/flat-valley/ (GitHub Pages). Generated from the hash-bound Paper A bundle -> PV-03 PublicClaim -> framework-free HTML/CSS/JS with static text+image equivalents; keyboard/reduced-motion accessible; strict CSP, no external network/tracking; corrected matched-endpoint story (no stale 25-49% transfer-failure wording). Shipped in PR #56 (1ba3e85) and corrected narrative PR #57; issue #54 closed.

items.title: PV-05 'More Physics Made It Worse' — model-composition interactive
items.acceptance_evidence: Live at https://trbrewer.github.io/puckworks/model-composition/ (Pages run 29659857291, source e8d94cf). Live data.json SHA-256 1c0abc00a2ae2ac177784cda30d166093b828ca42f7bd6641bafa0be156e11a1 matches the committed snapshot; every number generated by kappa_t_ladder/degeneracy_rmse/composition_residual/simulate and bound to the CC-BY Waszkiewicz trace; extraction-only 0.116 < constant 0.573 < composite 0.648 g/s; over-closes to 0.0998; strict CSP, no external network/tracking, static text+image equivalents; issue #59.

items.title: PV-04 'How We Falsified Our Own Espresso Headline' — analysis autopsy
items.acceptance_evidence: Live at https://trbrewer.github.io/puckworks/analysis-autopsy/ (GitHub Pages run 29663302756, conclusion success; deployed source commit 238714ba854cab414a21dab9297d47a7e12af3dc from product PR #63). Live data.json SHA-256 32eb808722753a0419bc2cc6f7996260cbe32c26ca0aa4968c4ae2f58dd0c3b2 == the committed packaged snapshot; all six site assets (index.html, app.js, styles.css, data.json, static-summary.txt, static-summary.png) return HTTP 200 and are byte-identical to the committed site; the trailing-slash root serves the interactive (not a directory listing); strict CSP (default-src 'none'), no external network/assets/tracking, same-origin data.json fetch only. Schema v2: result1_magnitude_comparison additively exposes replicate-level EY points, per-cell descriptive within-cell SDs (uncorrected, ddof=0) and n per cell; canonical middle-minus-coarse (dial 1.7 - dial 2.0) contrast -0.241 EY-pt, Welch 95% interval [-0.422, -0.060] excluding zero; cell means 18.27/19.38/19.62 % EY ordered with the middle below the coarse dial (no interior maximum); central-condition cup-mass value from rounded published coefficients 6.723 g vs project refit 3.918 g vs observed mean 3.876 g (precision-limited, not an over-prediction, 6.723 g is not itself a coefficient); model interior prominence 0.19 (5 bar)/0.029 (9 bar) EY-pt below the descriptive replicate spread 0.218. PV-04 PublicClaim consumes public.analysis_autopsy.pv04_values (verify reproduction). Per-panel evidence partitions; static text+PNG equivalents; native accessible controls; 49 PV-04 tests + 888/1-skip full suite + gates 50 PASS/1 ACK green; product PR #63 CI 22/22 green (no site/raw-CSV leak in dist). Grinder-DIAL positions on one machine/coffee/campaign; a dial is not a particle size and is non-portable without a calibrated adapter (no universal too-fine optimum). Issue #62.
